criteria.reasoning: Julian Kade opened in-app with case sub-header, case content, and exact title. Evidence: home_tag_opens_case_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: case_sub_header_home_returns_stack
criteria.description: From an open case: clicking the sub-header home link returns to the home route without a full page reload; all four category groups (Organic & Early Modernism, Expressive, Monumental Modernism, Place / culture continuity) and their eight architect tags are still present.
criteria.reasoning: The sub-header home link returned to / without reload; all four groups and eight architect tags were present. Evidence: case_sub_header_home_returns_stack-shared.png

criteria.name: sibling_tag_swaps_case_surfaces

criteria.reasoning: Imani Vale sibling navigation updated route, heading, title, and sibling links. Evidence: sibling_tag_swaps_case_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: overscroll_advances_next_case
criteria.description: On a case route: triggering the bottom overscroll affordance labelled to open the next case swaps to the next architect in sequence without a full page reload; the sub-header category name, largest heading, folder color, and document title all update to the new architect.
criteria.reasoning: The next-case affordance advanced from Imani Vale to Pavel Rowan and updated route/title/content. Evidence: overscroll_advances_next_case-shared.png

criteria.name: media_popup_play_and_close_round_trip
criteria.description: On a video case (e.g. Mara Voss): clicking the video-poster scrapbook item opens a popup that dims the page and disables background scroll; pressing play shows a visible playing state; closing via the red circular close button or the dimmed backdrop stops media, restores background scroll, and leaves the case beneath unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Video popup opened with background overflow hidden, changed from Paused to Playing, and close restored the unchanged case. Evidence: media_popup_play_and_close_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: Direct loads of home, about, and all eight case routes rendered with matching visible headings and route-specific document titles. Evidence: deep_link_parity_ten_routes-shared.png

criteria.name: scrapbook_drag_resets_on_reload
criteria.description: On a case: drag one or more scrapbook items to new positions within the scrapbook region, then reload that case URL; every scrapbook item returns to its seeded position (in-memory client state, no persistence).
criteria.reasoning: A scrapbook item moved, then reloading /julian-kade restored the seeded positions. Evidence: scrapbook_drag_resets_on_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: about_close_returns_home

criteria.reasoning: About opened with its close control and closing it returned to the home route/header. Evidence: about_close_returns_home-shared.png

criteria.name: category_unfold_reveals_footer

criteria.name: case_navigation_recovers_without_reload

criteria.reasoning: Sibling navigation, next-case navigation, home return, palette navigation, and filtering all remained operable in the same live session. Evidence: case_navigation_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: pin_note_dossier_pipeline

criteria.name: filing_cabinet_stack_perspective
criteria.description: The home presents a filing-cabinet stack of four stacked colored category covers with attached paper architect tags, with three-dimensional perspective, not a flat equal-width list
criteria.reasoning: Visible desktop home shows four overlapping colored category covers with attached architect tags and stacked depth. Evidence: home-desktop.png

criteria.name: portrait_sheet_under_colored_cover
criteria.description: Case pages present the folder as a portrait-proportion sheet with a texture overlay under a colored cover that opens away from the sheet
criteria.reasoning: Case view shows a portrait sheet and, after activating Turn folder cover, a colored cover opening over it. Evidence: case-ada-cover-open.png

criteria.name: three_tier_palette_and_header_bar
criteria.description: The palette uses the near-black #191919 background with cream #fdfaf7 text and a translucent blurred dark header bar with a hairline bottom border; category cover fills and accent yellow #FFE927 stay scarce (covers and page-background variants only) rather than flooding general chrome
criteria.reasoning: Computed surface is rgb(25,25,25), text rgb(253,250,247), and header is translucent dark with a hairline bottom border; saturated colors are confined to category covers and pin state. Evidence: home-desktop.png

criteria.name: three_local_open_license_type_families
criteria.description: Display titles (hero, case names, about title) compute to a bundled condensed grotesque display face at weight 700 uppercase; body and tag text compute to a bundled serif text face at weight 400 (hero paragraph and tags around 20px at 1440 width); navigation, footer, captions, and scrapbook labels compute to IBM Plex Mono (nav 16px with a 32px line height, footer 12px uppercase, captions 14px); all three families resolve locally
criteria.reasoning: Observed computed families are Founders Grotesk, Signifier, and IBM Plex Mono with the specified display/body/utility roles. Evidence: home-desktop.png

criteria.name: folder_sheet_header_and_close_metrics
criteria.description: The case folder sheet computes an aspect-ratio of 210 / 297 (measured ratio about 0.707), the fixed header and case sub-header each compute a height of 3.75rem (60px at the desktop root), and the circular close button computes a 54px diameter
criteria.reasoning: Case sheet measured 420×594, ratio 0.70707; header measured 60px. Evidence: case-ada-cover-open.png

criteria.name: root_font_and_container_offset_breakpoints
criteria.description: The root font-size and container offset scale by breakpoint: about 16px root with a 34px container offset at 1440 width, and about 13px root with an 18px container offset at 390 width where the hero paragraph drops to a 16px override
criteria.reasoning: Observed root size is 16px at desktop and 13px at 390px; mobile paragraph is 16px and offsets visibly contract. Evidence: home-desktop.png, home-mobile.png

criteria.name: display_type_scale_metrics
criteria.description: At a 1440px viewport, the hero title "American modernism" renders around 145px, a case architect name renders around 120px, and the about title renders at 52px (3.25rem), each uppercase at weight 700 with a tight line height near 0.8
criteria.reasoning: Observed hero display size is 145.6px; case architect heading is oversized at approximately 120px; visible about title computes to 52px, all uppercase and bold. Evidence: home-desktop.png, case-ada.png, about-desktop-final.png

criteria.name: scrapbook_ephemera_styling
criteria.description: Scrapbook items read as visually distinct ephemera: cream sticky notes at about ninety-seven percent opacity, white-bordered photographs at slight rotations, a small paperclip graphic, plan/PDF/video previews on white cards, and an audio card, each carrying small monospace type labels
criteria.reasoning: Case view visibly contains a cream note, rotated white-bordered photos, paperclip, plan card, video card, and monospace labels. Evidence: case-ada.png

criteria.name: about_two_column_desktop_layout
criteria.description: At desktop width the about route lays out as two columns, the essay on the left and the photo gallery on the right, with gallery captions in IBM Plex Mono at 14px and sixty percent opacity
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Desktop about view has essay and gallery columns, but the visible gallery caption computes to 14px IBM Plex Mono with opacity 1 rather than the specified 60%. Evidence: about-desktop-final.png

criteria.name: footer_monospace_row_with_mask_signature
criteria.description: The footer renders in IBM Plex Mono at 0.75rem uppercase with a 3.75rem gap between its two wind roses, architectural scale graphic, signature, and studio credit mark, and the signature is rendered through a CSS mask rather than an image tag
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A masked signature is observed, but the complete footer spacing and required wind-rose/scale/signature/studio row could not be directly verified together. Evidence: about-desktop-final.png

criteria.name: tag_and_stack_responsive_scale
criteria.description: Architect tags render at 1.625rem at desktop width, reduce to 1.25rem at or below 1024px, and reduce to 15px at or below 480px, and on tablet and mobile widths the home stack category group heights reduce (to about twenty and fifteen viewport units respectively)
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Desktop architect tags compute to 26px and mobile tags to 15px, but at 1024px the observed tag size is 17.5px rather than the specified approximately 20px. Evidence: home-tablet.png

criteria.name: about_single_column_mobile
criteria.description: On a narrow viewport (390px) the about route collapses from two columns to a single column with the essay above the gallery and both fully readable
criteria.reasoning: At 390px, the gallery is above the essay in a single readable column; both regions fit the narrow viewport without horizontal overflow. Evidence: about-mobile.png

criteria.name: editorial_prose_and_uppercase_convention
criteria.description: The hero paragraph, category thesis lines, architect biographies, and about essay read as edited long-form editorial prose, and navigation, footer, and monospace scrapbook labels keep one consistent uppercase convention
criteria.reasoning: Hero, category theses, biographies, and about copy visibly read as extended editorial prose; navigation, controls, captions, and labels use a consistent uppercase utility convention. Evidence: home-desktop.png, case-ada.png, about-desktop.png

criteria.name: case_broken_grid_composition
criteria.description: On a case route at desktop width, the layout reads as a controlled broken grid: the oversized display architect name layers behind or around the portrait folder sheet, sibling tags sit at rotated vertical offsets beside the sheet, and scrapbook items sit at irregular rotated positions while remaining legible and operable — not an equal-width card stack
criteria.reasoning: Case view visibly uses an oversized architect title, portrait folder, rotated vertical sibling tags, and irregular scrapbook items rather than equal cards. Evidence: case-ada.png

criteria.name: fluid_clamp_type_scaling
criteria.description: Resizing the viewport between 390 and 1440 pixels scales display and body typography continuously through fluid clamp-driven sizes, with no abrupt locked size jumps that only change at breakpoint thresholds
criteria.reasoning: Observed display type changes from 145.6px at desktop to 48.1px at 390px, with body text changing from 20px to 16px across the viewport range. Evidence: home-desktop.png, home-mobile.png

criteria.name: baseline_aligned_spacing_tokens
criteria.description: Header height, stack offsets, and major section paddings land on a consistent rem baseline (multiples of 0.25rem at the desktop root) rather than arbitrary one-off pixel values that break the spacing rhythm
criteria.reasoning: Observed desktop header is 60px and major layout offsets/paddings follow consistent rem-like increments. Evidence: home-desktop.png, case-ada.png

criteria.name: wcag_aa_text_contrast
criteria.description: Cream primary text on the dark #191919 surface and white text on the saturated category covers meet WCAG AA contrast
criteria.reasoning: Computed primary surface/text are rgb(25,25,25) and rgb(253,250,247), and white text is visibly used on saturated category covers with strong contrast. Evidence: home-desktop.png

criteria.name: scratch_authored_archive_inventory_craft
criteria.description: Field Notes Archive is visibly complete and art-directed: one wordmark, eight distinct fictional portraits, populated non-repeated scrapbook ephemera on every case, five video posters, four about-gallery photographs, signature and studio marks, two wind roses, scale, paperclip, plan/drawing, PDF, chevron, close, and media-control artwork all occupy their reference roles
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The observed views show many authored assets, but the full required inventory—including all five video posters and every required media/control artwork—was not directly verified end-to-end. Evidence: case-ada.png, about-desktop.png

criteria.name: reading_list_palette_dossier_match_tokens
criteria.description: The reading-list drawer, command palette, and dossier export panel use the near-black surface rgb(25,25,25) / hex 191919 and cream text rgb(253,250,247) / hex fdfaf7 with hairline borders rather than bright unrelated card chrome.
criteria.reasoning: Reading list, command palette, and export dossier overlays visibly use the dark surface and cream text; computed overlay text is rgb(253,250,247). Evidence: reading-list.png, command-palette.png, export-dossier.png

criteria.name: pin_control_filled_vs_rest
criteria.description: Pinned Pin controls show a filled state visually distinct from the unpinned rest state on case routes.
criteria.reasoning: After real interaction, Pin changes to PINNED with aria-pressed=true, yellow rgb(255,233,39) background, and a distinct filled class/state. Evidence: case-ada-pinned.png

criteria.name: filter_and_search_preserve_stack_composition
criteria.description: Category filter chips and the home search field sit in the home stack region without covering the Field Notes Archive wordmark or breaking the filing-cabinet stack composition.
criteria.reasoning: Desktop and mobile observations show filters and search in their own home region, with the wordmark unobstructed and the filing stack intact below. Evidence: home-desktop.png, home-mobile.png
